flow: Create Import Letter of Credit — sub-panel deep-dive scrape (continuation of 2026-05-22)
purpose: Capture locators for sub-panels that don't render in the initial form: Revolving sub-fields, Additional Conditions, Refer Codes overlay, Save As Draft dialog, Tab 7 Save-as-Template, file upload, Tab 5 Confirming Bank. Used to convert test.fixme cases in ilc-create.spec.ts into runnable tests.

revolvingTypeRadio_new.note: Was previously assumed to be 'Monthly/Quarterly/Half Yearly/Yearly' per FSD — live AUT only exposes Value | Time. The Time path reveals Cumulative + Repeat Frequency below.

repeatFrequencyLov.note: Two values only — Weeks/Years/Quarters NOT in this build's LOV.

cashCollateralAddAccount.click_outcome_2026_05_23: Click did NOT reveal the SettlementAccountNumber wrapper in this session, even with Percent set to 2. Sub-panel locators captured in the 2026-05-22 session (id=SettlementAccountNumber6046608, contribution input id='amount-check|input') are kept for reference but may not be reproducible without a non-empty draft or specific Percent + product state.

depositLinkageAddAccount.click_outcome_2026_05_23: No revealed widgets — likely corpmaker2 has no eligible deposits to link. Bank-side seeding required to capture the deposit-linkage sub-panel.

remaining_blockers: TC-IMPLC-031 (Currency-filtered Account LOV) — needs the Add-Account flow to actually reveal the LOV in this env.
TC-IMPLC-033/034 (Deposit Linkage) — needs a seeded FD/TD account.

confirmationInstructionsRadio.rendering: CONDITIONAL — present in some Tab-5 sessions (rescrape-2026-05-22 captured it), ABSENT in others (rescrape-2026-05-23 did not). Suspected gating: product/entitlement filter on a saved-draft-resume state. Tests should skip cleanly when this widget is absent.

tab5_confirming_bank_notes.confirmingBankSection: Renders only when Confirmation Instructions = Confirm or May Add. The Confirming Bank section reveals a SWIFT/Name-and-Address radio mirroring the Advising Bank pattern. Literal ids NOT yet captured — use role+name selectors (getByRole('radiogroup', {name: /Confirming Bank/i})).

tab1_swiftLookup.trigger: Click 'Lookup SWIFT Code' link next to availableWithSwiftCode (Tab 1) or advBankSwiftCode (Tab 5).
tab1_swiftLookup.note: obdx-suffixed ids are session-scoped — match by [id^='swiftCode_obdx'] etc. Search input opens a results table; non-empty results depend on the test env's RMA data.

saveAsDraft_dialog.trigger: Click 'Save As Draft' button (text-based selector; no stable id).

tab7_saveAsTemplate_notes.yesStateSubFields: Toggling Yes is expected to reveal a Template Name input + Access Type (Public/Private) radio. Sub-field locators not captured in AE/corpmaker2 — feature likely entitlement-gated. TC-IMPLC-045 currently soft-skips when the sub-fields don't render.

tab7_fileUpload.postUpload: Uploaded filename appears as text in the Attachments section. Per-row Delete + 'Delete All' affordances render after at least one file is uploaded.

tests_converted_from_fixme: TC-IMPLC-007 (Revolving by Time + Auto-Reinstatement + Cumulative + Repeat Frequency)
TC-IMPLC-008 (Revolving by Value — no Time-only sub-fields render)
TC-IMPLC-023 (Save Draft on Tab 2 — 'Saved' dialog appears)
TC-IMPLC-035 (Save Draft on Tab 4 — 'Saved' dialog appears)
TC-IMPLC-043 (File upload via hidden input + filename row appears)
TC-IMPLC-045 (Save as Template Yes toggle — soft-skips when sub-fields absent)
TC-BS-007 (Confirmation=Confirm + empty Confirming Bank blocks Next — skips when toggle absent)
TC-BS-013 (SWIFT lookup dialog opens + Bank Name search)
TC-BS-035 (Attach two PDF fixtures on CIF deal)

needs_external_resources.TC-BS-014: Non-RMA SWIFT BIC — needs a bank-supplied SWIFT that's verified-but-not-in-RMA for this env.
needs_external_resources.TC-BS-028: Cross-currency collateral — needs a seeded EUR (or non-USD) collateral account.
needs_external_resources.TC-BS-029: Invalid SWIFT BIC — needs a synthetic invalid value + bank confirmation of expected error wording.
needs_external_resources.TC-BS-031: Maker submits, Checker approves — needs a corpchecker2 fixture + ApprovalQueuePage.
needs_external_resources.TC-BS-032: Checker rejects with reason — depends on TC-BS-031 unblocker.

needs_SG_entity_or_LOV_values.TC-IMPLC-015: SG 42A 35-char limit — needs SG Tab-1 advising-bank scrape on corpmaker3.
needs_SG_entity_or_LOV_values.TC-IMPLC-018: SG 44A/44B 65-char — needs SG Tab-1 mandatory-field scrape so Tab-2 can be reached.
needs_SG_entity_or_LOV_values.TC-BS-021: 40A IRREVOCABLE STANDBY — value absent in AE build's 40A LOV (SG-only).

needs_env_seeded_state.TC-IMPLC-006: Limits LOV — confirmed absent in AE/corpmaker2 build. Needs an entitled user.
needs_env_seeded_state.TC-IMPLC-024: Documents picker — confirmed NOT exposed in AE/corpmaker2 build (Tab 3 search-by-document-name returns empty for 'Commercial'/'Invoice').
needs_env_seeded_state.TC-IMPLC-031: Currency-filtered Account LOV — Cash Collateral Add Account is a no-op in this env.
needs_env_seeded_state.TC-IMPLC-033: Deposit Linkage — no eligible deposits surfaced.
needs_env_seeded_state.TC-IMPLC-034: Linked amount exceeds balance — depends on TC-IMPLC-033 unblocker.
needs_env_seeded_state.TC-IMPLC-047: Preview Draft Copy — confirmed absent in this build.

needs_additional_POM_work.TC-BS-003: List saved templates — needs a TemplatesPage object.
needs_additional_POM_work.TC-BS-030: View Import LC after submission — needs ViewImportLcFlowPage.searchByCustomerReference + assertLcRowVisible helpers.
needs_additional_POM_work.TC-IMPLC-044: Reject .exe / oversize file — needs a 25MB fixture + a .exe fixture under fixtures/attachments/.
needs_additional_POM_work.TC-IMPLC-023-RESUME: Cross-session resume — needs a SavedDraftsPage object with searchByName + openDraft.
needs_additional_POM_work.TC-BS-036: Usance LC USN-ACC-RY-05 — needs ILC-INU product to actually appear in the Revolving=Yes filtered product LOV. Verified not present in AE/corpmaker2 LOV.
